posts.text:
It is possible that the relationship recession will not correct itself. A striking 7% of singletons say they would consider a robo-romance with an AI companion. 

AI is patient, AI is kind and it won’t ask you to clean the bathroom or get a better job https://www.economist.com/leaders/2025/11/06/the-rise-of-singlehood-is-reshaping-the-world?taid=6a1ea4f6abb4210001d08df5&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
Correct. And just like the shale boom, the entire industry is stuck in a prisoner’s dilemma where every player must keep spending or risk beeing seen as a laggard in the race to zero

If you want to visualize the next decade of big tech returns, just plot the $xle from 2012 - 2021
posts.author: hkuppy
